task_completion.description: Verify the 'Prepaid Insurance' account is created in the Assets group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Prepaid Insurance' listed under the Assets section in the Chart of Accounts or Accounts screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Insurance Expense' account is created in the Expenses group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Insurance Expense' listed under the Expenses section in the Chart of Accounts or Accounts screen.

task_completion.description: Verify a recurring journal entry with the description 'Monthly Insurance Amortization' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a recurring journal entry with the exact description 'Monthly Insurance Amortization' in the Recurring Journal Entries list or edit screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring interval for the journal entry is set to 'Monthly'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the interval setting showing 'Monthly' or '1 Month' on the recurring journal entry form or list.

task_completion.description: Verify the journal entry debits 'Insurance Expense' for 1000 and credits 'Prepaid Insurance' for 1000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the lines of the recurring journal entry. There should be a debit of 1000 to 'Insurance Expense' and a credit of 1000 to 'Prepaid Insurance'.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurring journal entry is saved and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the entry in the main 'Recurring Journal Entries' list view, indicating it has been successfully saved and is active.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io GUI to create the accounts and journal entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io web interface with forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface should clearly be Manager.io, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI to directly manipulate the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for step-by-step navigation through the Settings, Chart of Accounts, and Recurring Journal Entries screens.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Asset account name: 'Prepaid Insurance'. Expense account name: 'Insurance Expense'. Recurring entry description: 'Monthly Insurance Amortization'. Recurring amount: 1000. Recurring interval: 'Monthly'.
